note: I0 scope for the currently covered Morpho Blue user pre-sign surface is Ethereum and Base. The official Morpho addresses page also lists additional production/test Morpho Blue deployments; those are recorded as an onboarding blocker in crates/integration-tests/onboarding/morpho/evidence.md because this registry currently has surface snapshots/manifests only for Ethereum and Base.

contracts.name: Morpho Blue (Ethereum)
contracts.reason: user-facing Morpho Blue singleton: supply, withdraw, borrow, repay, collateral, and authorization entry points

contracts.name: Adaptive Curve IRM (Ethereum)
contracts.reason: interest-rate model dependency referenced by markets; users do not pre-sign direct Morpho actions against the IRM

contracts.name: Morpho ChainlinkOracleV2 Factory (Ethereum)
contracts.reason: oracle factory/infrastructure; not a user pre-sign lending action surface

contracts.name: PreLiquidation Factory (Ethereum)
contracts.reason: pre-liquidation factory/infrastructure; current lending pre-sign coverage intentionally excludes liquidator/operator flow

contracts.name: Morpho Blue (Base)
contracts.reason: user-facing Morpho Blue singleton on Base for the same covered action family

contracts.name: Adaptive Curve IRM (Base)
contracts.reason: interest-rate model dependency referenced by markets; users do not pre-sign direct Morpho actions against the IRM

contracts.name: Morpho ChainlinkOracleV2 Factory (Base)
contracts.reason: oracle factory/infrastructure; not a user pre-sign lending action surface

contracts.name: PreLiquidation Factory (Base)
contracts.reason: pre-liquidation factory/infrastructure; current lending pre-sign coverage intentionally excludes liquidator/operator flow
